targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    id,
    CASE WHEN (result IS true AND changes IS false) THEN 'unchanged'
    WHEN (result IS false) THEN 'failed'
    WHEN (result IS true AND changes IS true) THEN 'changed'
    END status,
    state,
    jsonb_pretty(return::jsonb) AS return
FROM states
WHERE jid='$JID';

panels.description: Display the duration of all job runs with the same name to understand the job duration over time
panels.title: JOB DURATION TIME

panels.description: Display a complete JSON message returned by the corresponding Salt job. You can expand or collapse JSON sections.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT jsonb_pretty(full_ret::jsonb) AS full_ret
FROM salt_returns
WHERE jid = '$JID'

panels.title: JOB CACHE DATA
